pairs.error_span: The mean is the middle value of the ordered list, so it is 4
pairs.support_span: The mean is the sum divided by the count

pairs.error_span: The range is the average of the numbers
pairs.support_span: The range is maximum minus minimum
the coefficient is the number multiplying x^3

pairs.error_span: The reciprocal means the additive inverse, -4
pairs.support_span: The reciprocal is the number that multiplies by 4 to give 1

pairs.error_span: A 20% increase means the new price is 20% of the original
pairs.support_span: A 20% increase means add 20% of 50 to the original price

pairs.error_span: Without replacement means the first ball is put back before the second draw
pairs.support_span: Without replacement means the second draw has 2 red balls left out of 4 balls

pairs.error_span: The base is 8 and the argument is 2
pairs.support_span: log base 2 of 8 asks what exponent on 2 gives 8

pairs.error_span: Nearest tenth means drop all later digits, so 4.6
pairs.support_span: the hundredths digit is 7, so the tenths digit rounds up
